# MCPorter Tool Catalog

MCPorter discovered these MCP tools from the current local mcporter configuration.

When one of these selectors clearly matches the user request, call `mcporter` with `action="call"` directly. Use `action="describe"` for schema details. Use `action="search"` only when no warmed selector fits.

## Warmed MCP selectors

- `context7.query-docs` — Retrieves and queries up-to-date documentation and code examples from Context7 for any programming library or framework. You must call 'Res…
- `context7.resolve-library-id` — Resolves a package/product name to a Context7-compatible library ID and returns matching libraries. You MUST call this function before 'Que…
- `flux.get_flux_instance` — This tool retrieves the Flux instance installation and a detailed report about Flux controllers, CRDs and their status.
- `flux.get_kubeconfig_contexts` — This tool retrieves the Kubernetes clusters name and context found in the kubeconfig.
- `flux.get_kubernetes_api_versions` — This tool retrieves the Kubernetes CRDs registered on the cluster and returns the preferred apiVersion for each kind.
- `flux.get_kubernetes_logs` — This tool retrieves logs from a Kubernetes pod.
- `flux.get_kubernetes_metrics` — This tool retrieves metrics from a Kubernetes pod.
- `flux.get_kubernetes_resources` — This tool retrieves Kubernetes resources from the cluster.
- `flux.search_flux_docs` — This tool searches the Flux documentation for a given query, using concise docs by default with complete API docs available on request.
- `flux.set_kubeconfig_context` — This tool sets the current Kubernetes context in the kubeconfig.
- `nixos.nix` — Query NixOS, Home Manager, Darwin, FlakeHub, flakes, Nixvim, Wiki, nix.dev, Noogle, NixHub. Examples (the JSON shape matters — copy exactly…
- `nixos.nix_versions` — Get package version history from NixHub.io.
- `open-design.cancel_run` — Request cancellation of an in-flight run started by start_run.
- `open-design.create_artifact` — Create one normal Open Design project artifact entry file. Writes name+content, rejects existing targets, and persists artifactManifest whe…
- `open-design.create_project` — Create a new empty Open Design project to generate into, then call start_run against it. Returns the project (with its id) plus a conversat…
- `open-design.delete_file` — Delete one file from a project. Supports nested paths (e.g. "codex-product/index.html"). Project optional; defaults to the active project.
- `open-design.delete_project` — Permanently delete an Open Design project including its files and conversations. Requires both an explicit project id/name AND confirm:true…
- `open-design.get_active_context` — Project + file the user has open in Open Design right now. Returns {active:false, hint:"..."} when no project is active so the agent can as…
- `open-design.get_artifact` — PREFER THIS over multiple get_file calls. Bundles the entry file plus every sibling it references (HTML <script>/<link>/<img>/srcset, JSX i…
- `open-design.get_file` — Read one project file. Text mimes only (HTML, JSX, CSS, JSON, SVG, Markdown). Binary files return an error; use list_files for metadata. Re…
- `open-design.get_project` — Single project metadata: name, active skill/design-system ids, entryFile, kind, timestamps, resolvedDir, and (when it has an entry file) a …
- `open-design.get_run` — Poll a run started by start_run. Returns status (queued|running|succeeded|failed|canceled) plus error info. On success, adds previewUrl (op…
- `open-design.list_agents` — List the agent CLIs Open Design can run for start_run.agent. Returns only installed (available) agents by default — pass includeUnavailable…
- `open-design.list_files` — Project file metadata: name, path, mime, kind, size, mtime, optional artifactManifest. Pass since=<unix-ms> to cheap-poll for changes.
- `open-design.list_plugins` — List installed Open Design plugins (packaged design workflows) you can pass to start_run as plugin + inputs.
- `open-design.list_projects` — List every Open Design project on this daemon.
- `open-design.list_skills` — List Open Design skills you can pass to start_run as a recipe. Discovery only — Open Design runs the skill, not you.
- `open-design.search_files` — Case-insensitive literal-substring search across textual files in a project. Returns up to max matches with file, 1-indexed line, and snipp…
- `open-design.start_run` — Commission Open Design to generate or refine a design. Open Design spawns its own agent to do the work and returns a runId immediately. Pol…
- `open-design.write_file` — Write (or overwrite) a project file. Unlike create_artifact this does not require an ArtifactManifest and tolerates existing targets, so it…
